Name: DELIVERY_ARRIVAL
Description:
DELIVERY_ARRIVAL

When a Truck arrives security or logistics record the arrival of the Truck and each PO Document on the Truck.  This is logged in custom_Document_TrackingLog.  It can also add the PO into IntegrationQueue to get latest version of the Document from ERP.

The process also adds in the Grid and enquiry for showing the DocumentTrackingLog.  There is a lookup on the first step for the Delivery Location.  We default this to DeliveryApron, but should be setup as a location in deployment.
Author: Craig Collins
